candidates.title: Paper Autonomous Decision Loop and Shadow-Live Readiness Contract
candidates.description: Deterministic, paper-only autonomous decision loop with local sample data, RiskManager gating, audit artifacts, and a planning-only shadow-live/read-only contract.
candidates.notes: No live trading, live submit, broker order submission, or real provider calls. No version bump, tag, release, or PyPI publication.

candidates.title: Autonomous Paper Decision Quality Scorecard and Promotion Gate
candidates.description: Deterministic offline scorecard that evaluates autonomous-paper artifacts for future shadow-live/read-only review eligibility.
candidates.notes: No live trading, live submit, broker order submission, or real provider calls. No version bump, tag, release, or PyPI publication.

candidates.title: Execution-Neutral Autonomous Trading Kernel and Stateful Paper Runner
candidates.description: Adds a reusable execution-neutral trading kernel and a stateful paper runner that persists portfolio state, resumes from the last bar, prevents duplicate processing, and produces honest trading metrics. Remains paper-only; no live trading, no broker submission, no provider calls.
notes: Does not load credentials or call real brokers/providers.

candidates.title: Autonomous Paper Trading Quality Gate
candidates.description: Adds a deterministic, offline trading-quality gate that evaluates stateful paper trading behavior for future shadow-live/read-only quality review eligibility. Reads local metrics, decisions, fills, and runner-state artifacts. Paper-only; no live trading, no broker submission, no provider calls.
notes: Does not load credentials or call real brokers/providers.
Does not approve live trading or claim profitability.

candidates.title: Shadow-Live Read-Only Fixture-First Comparison
candidates.description: Adds a strictly read-only, fixture-first comparison between a stateful paper run and a recorded local broker-like snapshot. Consumes the CAND-004 trading-quality gate and produces deterministic shadow-live-comparison.json and shadow-live-report.md artifacts. No broker API calls, no credential loading, no live submit, no live readiness claim.
notes: Implemented as local fixture comparison only.
Does not call real broker APIs by default.
Does not load credentials or secrets.
Does not submit orders or mutate broker state.
Does not indicate live readiness, trading safety, profitability, or permission to submit orders.

candidates.title: Gated Submit Conformance Rehearsal
candidates.description: Adds a simulated-only, fixture-driven conformance rehearsal that consumes CAND-004 quality evidence, CAND-005 shadow-live comparison evidence, a hypothetical order-intent fixture, and simulated kill-switch, risk-envelope, and approval fixtures, and records a non-transmittable dry-run submit request.
notes: Does not submit orders or mutate broker state.
Does not call real broker or provider APIs.
Does not load credentials or secrets.
Does not instantiate runtime Order, OrderRouter, RiskManager, ApprovalManager, or kill-switch objects.
Does not indicate live readiness, trading safety, profitability, or permission to submit orders.
No version bump, tag, GitHub Release, or PyPI publication.
